funFactor.note: Classic buy-travel-sell loop with flavorful Prohibition events delivers satisfying tension.

replayability.note: Random markets, scheduled rare events, and rank chase support multiple runs; 44.5–59.5% Big Daddy J rates in sim show high ceiling.

progression.note: Single 30-day arc with rank/score only — no meta unlocks or persistent upgrades beyond high scores.

strategicDepth.note: Territory modifiers, debt/bank arbitrage, and event chasing add layers; gun/debt exploits reduce depth for optimizers.

sessionLength.note: 15–25 minute full runs ideal for mobile; PWA offline supports commute sessions.

decisionQuality.note: Meaningful daily choices: where to travel, what to hold, when to bank, fight vs bribe.

riskRewardBalance.note: Aggressive strategy dominates sim (+32% avg wealth vs conservative); debt is punishing but exploitable via bank spread.

learningCurve.note: Tutorial covers basics; territory modifiers and event calendar require discovery.

themeExecution.note: Prohibition NYC flavor, historical event names, and deadpan copy strongly differentiate from generic trading clones.

marketDifferentiation.note: PWA + period theme + 8-bit event art vs app-store clones; no accounts/tracking is a selling point.

viralPotential.note: No share hooks, screenshots, or async competition; high-score table is local only.

retentionPotential.note: One-more-run appeal from rank chase and rare event stories; limited meta may cap D30.

monetisation.assumptionsLabel: All figures below are estimates — no analytics or ad SDK integrated.

adPlacements.placement: Rewarded video — reveal next scheduled event district
adPlacements.impact: Adds strategy value without paywalling core loop

adPlacements.placement: Banner on Title screen footer only
adPlacements.impact: Avoid during market/travel to preserve C Style static layout

freeVersion.frequencyRecommendation: Max 1 interstitial per session, 3 per day; rewarded opt-in only
freeVersion.retentionImpactEstimate: 5–10% D7 drop if interstitials exceed 1/session (industry baseline for casual)

valueProposition: Intel Brief — event calendar showing scheduled rare/super/godlike days
premiumVersion.conversionLikelihood: Moderate — niche retro audience tolerates ads; premium appeals to completionists
premiumVersion.recommendedPricing: $2.99 one-time is appropriate; bundle at $4.99 with cosmetic pack if IAP added later

d1.basis: Short-session PWA, instant play, no account friction

d30.basis: No meta progression or social features

freeToPaid.basis: Niche theme, low price, ad fatigue on repeat runs

mostLikelyRetain: Players who discover rare event stories

comparisons.classicTradingGame: Same mechanical skeleton with richer Prohibition theme and event layer — favorable for modern audiences
comparisons.pocketTradingClones: Comparable loop; Gang Wars wins on presentation and PWA delivery
comparisons.retroTradingGames: Above average production value; hybrid UI slightly breaks pure retro fantasy
comparisons.idleStrategy: More active/decision-dense; shorter sessions than idle titles
comparisons.mobileManagementSims: Simpler economy but tighter pacing; less grind

popularity.forecast: Moderate niche success — strong for Prohibition/retro subculture and PWA distribution; unlikely to break mass casual top charts without social/viral hooks.

technicalHealth.note: 0 critical, 4 high issues; all tests pass
